import { useNavigate } from "react-router-dom"; import { useState } from "react"; import "./Dashboard.css"; function Dashboard() { const navigate = useNavigate(); const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState(""); // Koleksi Buku Cerita Anak Indonesia const books = [ { id: 1, title: "Laskar Pelangi", author: "Andrea Hirata", price: "Rp 85.000", image: "https://source.unsplash.com/300x400/?children,book", category: "Sastra Indonesia" }, { id: 2, title: "Si Kancil: Cerita Rakyat Indonesia", author: "Tradisional", price: "Rp 65.000", image: "https://source.unsplash.com/300x400/?storybook,children", category: "Fabel Anak" }, { id: 3, title: "Anak-Anak Kolong Jembatan", author: "Seno Gumira Ajidarma", price: "Rp 75.000", image: "https://source.unsplash.com/300x400/?kids,reading", category: "Cerita Anak" }, { id: 4, title: "Negeri di Ujung Tanduk", author: "Panuti Sudjiman", price: "Rp 70.000", image: "https://source.unsplash.com/300x400/?fantasy,book", category: "Fantasi Anak" }, { id: 5, title: "Hansel dan Gretel Versi Indonesia", author: "Djemari", price: "Rp 60.000", image: "https://source.unsplash.com/300x400/?fairytale,book", category: "Dongeng Klasik" }, { id: 6, title: "Malin Kundang: Cerita Legenda Minangkabau", author: "Tradisional", price: "Rp 55.000", image: "https://source.unsplash.com/300x400/?indonesia,folklore", category: "Legenda Indonesia" }, { id: 7, title: "Roro Jonggrang: Kisah Candi Prambanan", author: "Tradisional", price: "Rp 60.000", image: "https://source.unsplash.com/300x400/?temple,legend", category: "Legenda Indonesia" } ]; const filteredBooks = books.filter((book) => book.title.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) || book.author.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) || book.category.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) ); const handleLogout = () => { navigate("/"); }; return (

); } export default Dashboard;
